title: POV: You Realize Why Your ICT Setups Keep Failing
description: That moment when you discover the missing piece in your ICT trading strategy. Are you making this common mistake with your market structure breaks?

scenes.text: POV: You just realized you're entering too early. Every single time.
scenes.visualQuery: person having realization moment in dark room with screen glow

scenes.text: Market structure breaks. But you jump in immediately. No confirmation.
scenes.visualQuery: market structure break with premature entry point highlighted

scenes.text: Wait for the retest. Let price come back. Then strike.
scenes.visualQuery: proper market structure break entry after retest confirmation

scenes.text: Follow for more ICT insights. Your entries will thank you.
scenes.visualQuery: confident trader looking at profitable charts

script: POV: You just realized you're entering too early. Every single time. Market structure breaks. But you jump in immediately. No confirmation. Wait for the retest. Let price come back. Then strike. Follow for more ICT insights. Your entries will thank you.
